fetch vst3sdk and make strip downed of unneeded files and folders
in ../sdk folder, do
----
clone vst3sdk from github with submodules
remove */.git
remove doc
remove vstgui4
remove tutorials
remove public.sdk/samples/vst
remove public.sdk/samples/vst-hosting/audiohost
remove public.sdk/samples/vst-hosting/editorhost
remove public.sdk/samples/vst-hosting/inspectorapp
